reason: Owns the hya-tui versus hya-tui-lib boundary, app-specific renderer shape, semantic styling, and non-snapshot component testing rules.
Requires TDD, saturating terminal geometry, prompt visibility, 80/120-column semantic render coverage, and the Rust frontend verification gate.
Requires reuse of the existing keymap table, projection, wrapper, and event-dispatch patterns instead of parallel constants or state.
Guides the projection-to-runtime-to-render data flow and keeps ownership resolution in the shared projection rather than duplicated by consumers.
